title: Extreme Weather Shelters - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search 3 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF COOLING CENTERS CLACKAMAS COUNTY SOCIAL SERVICES DIVISION COOLING SHELTER LOCATOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on cooling centers during an extreme heat event. May offer additional cooling resources. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Cooling centers operate during heat advisories. Locations are open either throughout the summer season or when temperature thresholds are met. (503) 650-5622 Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER CLACKAMAS COUNTY SOCIAL SERVICES CLACKAMAS COUNTY SEVERE WEATHER SHELTER LOCATOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on warming centers during a severe weather event. May offer additional warming resources. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Warming centers operate during the winter months and during severe weather advisories. Locations are open either throughout the winter season or when temperature thresholds are met. (503) 655-8640 Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER CLACKAMAS COUNTY THE FATHER'S HEART STREET MINISTRY OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers overnight shelter when the wind chill reaches 33 degrees or below during overnight hours. Dinner and snacks are provided. 603 12th Street Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Age 18 and older. Service animals on a leash or in a kennel are accepted. Hours: Open 7 days per week 6pm-7am when the wind chill reaches 33 degrees or below Email (503) 722-9780 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER CLACKAMAS COUNTY OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER
